title: KandyToys Glitter and Glow Space Sand Art Kit | Moving Sand Art | Art Set for Kids | Arts and Crafts
features: Explore The Galaxy - This Super fun Sand Art kit for kids has Four incredible celestial decorative bottle designs for you to fill. Including a Shooting star, Moon face, Space rocket and Planet!
Glow In The Dark - In this kids art set comes an awesome bag of glow in the dark sand, this will illuminate your designs giving them that wow factor!
Encourage Little Minds - Let the creativity flourish for hours with multiple designs you can create and help your kids grow a fascination for space
Easy To Use - Pour the coloured sand into the decorative bottles layer by layer using the tools provided in the art set. You can even wear the Pendant bottle and wear it everywhere you go!

Full Set Includes - 3 Sand art bottles with caps, 1 Pendant bottle with cap, 3 bags of Coloured sand, 1 Bag of glow sand (Green), 1 Bag of glitter, 1 Rainbow cord, 1 Sand crafting tool, 1 Plastic funnel Suitable For Ages 3+
description: Product Description Let imaginations run wild! Bringing creativity to life Part of the KandyToys family, Kreative Kids is an affordable range of children's arts and crafts activities great for all ages and all kinds of abilities. The range includes everything from pocket money minikits perfect for stocking fillers and gift bags to super value art kits and craft boxes, sewing kits, sand art and more! Explore arts and crafts Introduce your budding crafters to the world of arts and crafts with affordable mini kits, colouring kits and more! Learn new skills Try out new skills, give french knitting a go, or work on fine motor skills with modelling dough and cross stitch kits. Screen free play Get stuck with squishing, moulding, sculpting and explore sensory play through tactile crafts and playtime! Encourage creativity Let little ones stretch their imaginations through arts and crafts, explore unicorns, and wacky monster kits, or see where your imagination takes you!
